name: The Reception in the Tavarn of the hope.
description:
You are standing in the reception.  The staircase leads down to 
the entrance hall.  There is a small sign on the counter.

exits.description: You see the Tavern of Hope.

extra_descriptions.description:
Rooms are expensive but good!  You may:

   Offer - get an offer on a room - Time is in real life days.
   Rent  - Rent a room (saves your stuff, and quits the game),
           minimum charge is one day.


                          MY WAY OR THE HIGHWAY
                             PAY YOUR RENT!
                WE WON'T THINK TWICE BEFORE KICKING YOU OUT.
